NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL.description: URL of the AgentPay backend API (e.g. https://agentpay-api.onrender.com)

AGENTPAY_API_BASE_URL.description: Server-side URL of the AgentPay backend API (may differ from NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL in some deployments)

DASHBOARD_SESSION_SECRET.description: Secret used to HMAC-sign the HTTP-only session cookie. Must be at least 32 characters.
